Title:
Title-Source: body_internal|generated
No-Joke-Found: false

one guys walk into a toilet store. 
The guy who works there says, "There are only three types of toilets left.  A wood toilet, a metal toilet, and a singing toilet." The guy says he will take he wood toilet.
later another guy walks in and sais he wants a toilet.
the guy who works there say, "there are two types of toilets left.  A metal toilet and a singing toilet."
The man decides to take the metal toilet.
a little while later another guy walks in and says he wants a toilet.
the guy who works there says, "there is only on type of toilet left, the singing toilet."
the guy takes it.
the next day all three of them come in mad.  the first guy sais the the wood toilet gives him splinters on his butt.
the second guy says the the metal toilet makes his butt cold.
the third guy says that when he lifts up the toilet seat it sings, "Do you se what i see."
